Authors and Citation

Authors

  • Richard Hooijmaijers. Author.

  • Matthew Fidler. Author.

  • Bill Denney. Author, maintainer.

  • Kiranmayi Vedantham. Author.

Citation

Source: DESCRIPTION

Hooijmaijers R, Fidler M, Denney B, Vedantham K (2026). nlmixr2lib: A Model Library for 'nlmixr2'. R package version 0.3.2.9000, https://github.com/nlmixr2/nlmixr2lib. 

@Manual{,
  title = {nlmixr2lib: A Model Library for 'nlmixr2'},
  author = {Richard Hooijmaijers and Matthew Fidler and Bill Denney and Kiranmayi Vedantham},

  url = {https://github.com/nlmixr2/nlmixr2lib},
}
